# Methodology

### Statistical Inference

* Probability & Statistics
* Bayesian Statistics
* Causal Inference

### Mathematical & Decision Modeling

* Mathematical Modeling
* Reinforcement Learning

### Predictive Modeling

* Machine Learning
* Deep Learning

### Pattern Discovery

* Clustering
* Anomaly Detection

### Language & Knowledge Systems

* Natural Language Processing
* Graph Databases

---

# Communication and Leadership

* Mentoring and supervising students.
* Presenting and communicating results to non-technical audiences.
I have delivered talks and courses from a diverse range of audiences: medical doctors, economists, engineers, and students from different backgrounds. I have also presented my research at international conferences and workshops.
* Coordinating a teaching unit comprising five Probability and Statistics courses, including the design of the syllabus, the coordination of the teaching team, and the evaluation of students. 
That experience has helped me develop skills in project management, team coordination, and effective communication with both students and colleagues.
* International professional and academic collaboration. I have collaborated with researchers and professionals from different countries, which has helped me develop cross-cultural communication skills and the ability to work effectively in diverse teams.

---

# Tools & Frameworks

### Programming

* Python
* R
* SQL

### Data Analytics

* Pandas
* Polars
* Ibis

### Statistical Modeling

* PyMC
* Scikit-learn

### Machine Learning & Deep Learning

* PyTorch
* Optuna

### NLP & Generative AI

* SpaCy
* Hugging Face
* OpenAI API
* Mirascope

### Knowledge Graphs

* Neo4j

### Reinforcement Learning

* Stable Baselines3

### MLOps & Reproducibility

* MLflow
* Kedro
* Docker
* Git
* Cookiecutter

### Scientific Computing & Applications

* Marimo
* Gazpacho
